text:
+------+-------+----------------------+
| aslr | mlir  | outcome              |
+------+-------+----------------------+
| 1    | unset | finished in 00:50:52 |
| 0    | set   | finished in 00:57:55 |
+------+-------+----------------------+

Both resolve the issue. I don't know enough about what MLIR is to know what I'm giving up downstream by unsetting it? Especially since disabling ASLR isn't really a thing I want to do.
